description:
An Electron app for uploading diabetes device data to Tidepool's backend

Tidepool Uploader is a universal uploader app that allows you to retrieve data from supported devices, including every brand of insulin pump and continuous glucose monitor (CGM) on the US market and a wide variety of blood glucose meters and diabetes apps.
What's Changed
- fix broken links in docs (UPLOAD-1489) by @gniezen in https://github.com/tidepool-org/uploader/pull/1746
- Fix linting errors from install_tools check by @gniezen in https://github.com/tidepool-org/uploader/pull/1751
- Dependency updates for June '26 (UPLOAD-1653) by @gniezen in https://github.com/tidepool-org/uploader/pull/1753
- display POST records in debug mode for all devices (UPLOAD-1660) by @gniezen in https://github.com/tidepool-org/uploader/pull/1749
- Add support for Prodigy Pocket & Prodigy VOICE meters (UPLOAD-1663) by @gniezen in https://github.com/tidepool-org/uploader/pull/1752
Full Changelog: https://github.com/tidepool-org/uploader/compare/v2.66.0...v2.67.0
